title: Order of Battle: World War II
notes: It's obviously missing msttcorefonts, so the tooltips don't show anything (which is almost mandatory in this game). Introvideos don't show, but they can be disabled in the options. Other than that it runs well.

title: Order of Battle: World War II

notes: Tooltips issues fixed installing corefonts with winetricks.
title: Order of Battle: World War II

notes: With 3.16 beta no more need to install corefonts with winetricks. Disable play videos at launch for a smoother launch.
